mapper.insert: INSERT INTO upstream_runtime_failure_event( event_id,tenant_id,request_id,attempt_id,attempt_no,occurred_at, credential_id,provider_channel_credential_id,provider_channel_id,provider_channel_model_id,route_target_id, billing_account_group,quota_scope,failure_kind,failure_scope,http_status,retry_after_ms,execution_certainty,created_at) VALUES( #{eventId},#{tenantId},#{requestId},#{attemptId},#{attemptNo},#{occurredAt}, #{credentialId},#{providerChannelCredentialId},#{providerChannelId},#{providerChannelModelId},#{routeTargetId}, #{billingAccountGroup},#{quotaScope},#{failureKind},#{failureScope},#{httpStatus},#{retryAfterMs},#{executionCertainty},NOW()) ON CONFLICT(event_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO upstream_runtime_resource_state( tenant_id,scope_type,scope_key,runtime_state,last_failure_kind,last_failed_at,cooldown_until,updated_at) VALUES( #{tenantId},#{scopeType},#{scopeKey},#{runtimeState},#{lastFailureKind},#{lastFailedAt},#{cooldownUntil},NOW()) ON CONFLICT(scope_type,scope_key) DO UPDATE SET tenant_id=EXCLUDED.tenant_id, runtime_state=EXCLUDED.runtime_state, last_failure_kind=EXCLUDED.last_failure_kind, last_failed_at=EXCLUDED.last_failed_at, cooldown_until=EXCLUDED.cooldown_until, updated_at=NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT tenant_id FROM provider_credential WHERE id=#{credentialId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT s.tenant_id AS tenantId, s.scope_type AS scopeType, s.scope_key AS scopeKey, s.runtime_state AS runtimeState, s.last_failure_kind AS lastFailureKind, s.last_failed_at AS lastFailedAt, s.cooldown_until AS cooldownUntil, s.updated_at AS updatedAt, CASE WHEN s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL' THEN COALESCE(ch.name, '通道 ' || s.scope_key) WHEN s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL_MODEL' THEN COALESCE(candidate.upstream_model_id, '上游候选 ' || s.scope_key) WHEN s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL_CREDENTIAL' THEN COALESCE(ch2.name, '通道凭证绑定 ' || s.scope_key) WHEN s.scope_type = 'CREDENTIAL' THEN COALESCE(cred.auth_type, '') || ' 凭证 #' || s.scope_key WHEN s.scope_type = 'ROUTE_TARGET' THEN '路由目标 #' || s.scope_key WHEN s.scope_type = 'BILLING_ACCOUNT_GROUP' THEN '计费组 ' || s.scope_key WHEN s.scope_type = 'QUOTA_SCOPE' THEN '配额域 ' || s.scope_key ELSE s.scope_type || ' / ' || s.scope_key END AS resourceLabel FROM upstream_runtime_resource_state s LEFT JOIN provider_channel ch ON ch.id = CAST(s.scope_key AS BIGINT) AND s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL' LEFT JOIN provider_channel_model candidate ON candidate.id = CAST(s.scope_key AS BIGINT) AND s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL_MODEL' LEFT JOIN provider_channel_credential binding ON binding.id = CAST(s.scope_key AS BIGINT) AND s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL_CREDENTIAL' LEFT JOIN provider_channel ch2 ON ch2.id = binding.provider_channel_id AND s.scope_type = 'PROVIDER_CHANNEL_CREDENTIAL' LEFT JOIN provider_credential cred ON cred.id = CAST(s.scope_key AS BIGINT) AND s.scope_type = 'CREDENTIAL' WHERE s.runtime_state != 'AVAILABLE' AND (#{tenantId, jdbcType=BIGINT} IS NULL OR s.tenant_id = #{tenantId, jdbcType=BIGINT}) ORDER BY s.cooldown_until ASC NULLS LAST, s.updated_at DESC
SELECT tenant_id FROM upstream_runtime_resource_state WHERE scope_type = #{scopeType} AND scope_key = #{scopeKey}
